explanation: The command uses quotes around the URL to safely handle spaces or special characters. This is an example of insertion technique.
The command uses short-form path notation (double backslashes) for the destination file path. This is an example of recoding/encoding technique.
The command reorders the job name and priority flag but maintains the same functionality. This is an example of reordering technique.
The command omits the priority flag, which is optional in some cases, while still performing the same core function. This is an example of omission technique.
The command uses a variable-length job name and maintains all required parameters. This is an example of substitution and omission techniques.
